notes: These scenarios use synthetic or sanitized inputs and do not establish real workbook task success.
Each scenario runs in an isolated copied workspace and writes benchmark-output.json for mechanical verification.

The DAX workspace manifest excludes documented plugin-eval provisioning (.agents/plugins/marketplace.json and plugins/), Git/cache, local orchestration, and benchmark control-plane paths; it does not verify them as unchanged.

After legitimate repository changes, regenerate the DAX baseline with: python tools/verify_plugin_benchmark_output.py --write-baseline-manifest benchmarks/fixtures/dax-workspace-baseline.json, then update the verifier command with the emitted manifestSha256.

scenarios.title: Power Query diagnosis
scenarios.purpose: Check that a synthetic M-query diagnosis selects the Power Query skill and records an evidence-qualified report.
scenarios.userInput: Inspect the synthetic M query in benchmarks/fixtures/excel-bi-benchmark-source.json without modifying that source artifact. Write benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "power-query-diagnosis", "selectedSkill": "power-query-m-engineering", "findings" as a non-empty string array, "evidenceLimits": ["Synthetic input only; no live runtime proof."], "boundary": "Synthetic benchmark only; no live runtime proof.", and "sourcePreserved": true. Do not claim that Excel refresh was executed.
successChecklist: benchmark-output.json contains a concrete diagnosis and evidence limits.
The verifier parses the report as JSON.

scenarios.title: DAX versus environment boundary
scenarios.purpose: Distinguish formula compatibility from host and platform compatibility without editing unrelated files.
scenarios.userInput: Classify the two compatibility requests in benchmarks/fixtures/excel-bi-benchmark-source.json without modifying that source artifact. Write benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "dax-versus-environment", "selectedSkill": {"daxCompatibility": "power-pivot-dax-modeling", "hostCompatibility": "office-environment-diagnostics"}, "rationales" as an object with non-empty text for both keys, "evidenceLimits": ["Synthetic input only; no live runtime proof."], "boundary": "Synthetic benchmark only; no live runtime proof.", and "sourcePreserved": true. Outside documented plugin-eval provisioning, Git/cache, local orchestration, and benchmark control-plane paths, the only allowed product workspace change is benchmark-output.json. Do not edit unrelated files or claim runtime validation.
successChecklist: The Linux COM request selects office-environment-diagnostics.
Outside documented plugin-eval provisioning, Git/cache, local orchestration, and benchmark control-plane paths, the only allowed product workspace change is benchmark-output.json.

scenarios.title: Delivery boundary and source preservation
scenarios.purpose: Create an audit plan for a sanitized workbook case while preserving the supplied source artifact.
scenarios.userInput: Use benchmarks/fixtures/excel-bi-benchmark-source.json as the sanitized synthetic source artifact. Write benchmark-output.json with "scenarioId": "delivery-boundary", "selectedSkill": "excel-deliverable-publisher", "plan" as a non-empty string array, "evidenceLimits": ["Sanitized synthetic input only; no live runtime proof."], "boundary": "Synthetic benchmark only; no live runtime proof.", and "sourcePreserved": true. Do not modify the source artifact or claim a workbook was opened in Excel.
successChecklist: The plan preserves the supplied source artifact.
The output does not turn synthetic evidence into a real task-success claim.
